message.content:
@startuml
actor Foo1 #red
boundary "Foo2" as foo2
control "Foo3()" as foo3
entity "Foo4\n--\n" as foo4
database "Foo5" as foo5
collections ":I have a really long name:" as col6

foo1 -> foo2 : To boundary
activate foo2
note right of activate foo2
  This should be attached to activation bar
end note
deactivate foo2
foo1 -[#blue]-> foo3() : To control
foo1 --> entity_Foo4 : To entity
foo1 -->> database_foO5 : To database
foo1 <-[hidden]- collections_col6 : To collections
@enduml
